name: PWM Generator
description: A configurable PWM generator (12-bit period, percentage duty 1-99%), adapted from a Tiny Tapeout Apache-2.0 project, taken spec -> lint -> simulation -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met at 50 MHz: WNS 0.0 ns; 1040 std cells; 8078 um2
Self-checking TB reproduces commanded duty (25/50/75/10% @ period 100, 50% @ 60) PASSED
source_note: RTL core adapted from Tiny Tapeout MateaSamuel/tt08-pwm-generator (Apache-2.0, commit 731fb91); original self-checking TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally (native iverilog sim + local ORFS synth).
